title: centaurea × forsythiana
intro: Centaurea × forsythiana, also known as the Cornflower or Centaurea, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family. Traditionally, Centaurea has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Centaurea are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions, such as bronchitis and asthma. Centaurea can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
